: window.clearTimeout.bind(window);

pausedFrameCallbacks.set(frameId, callback);

<meta charset="UTF-8" />
<meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0" />
<title>Nature's Beauty — Bloom with Elegance</title>
<link rel="preconnect" href="https://fonts.googleapis.com" />
<link rel="preconnect" href="https://fonts.gstatic.com" crossorigin />
<link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Cormorant+Garamond:ital,wght@0,400;0,500;0,600;1,400&family=Jost:wght@300;400;500;600&display=swap" rel="stylesheet" />
<style>
:root{
--peach-50:#fdf2ec;
--peach-100:#fbe5da;
--peach-200:#f7d2c2;
--coral:#e86a5a;
--coral-deep:#b14334;
--rose:#d23f5a;
--ink:#3a2420;
--ink-soft:#6b4d46;
--leaf:#5b6b4f;
--cream:#fff8f4;
}
*{margin:0;padding:0;box-sizing:border-box}
html{scroll-behavior:auto}
body{
font-family:'Jost',sans-serif;
background:var(--peach-50);
color:var(--ink);
overflow-x:hidden;
-webkit-font-smoothing:antialiased;
}
h1,h2,h3,.serif{font-family:'Cormorant Garamond',serif;font-weight:500}
.eyebrow{
font-family:'Jost',sans-serif;
text-transform:uppercase;
letter-spacing:.32em;
font-size:.72rem;
font-weight:500;
color:var(--coral-deep);
}
section{position:relative}
/* ---------- progress bar ---------- */
.progress{
position:fixed;top:0;left:0;height:3px;width:100%;
background:linear-gradient(90deg,var(--coral),var(--rose));
transform:scaleX(0);transform-origin:0 50%;z-index:200;
}
/* ---------- nav ---------- */
nav{
position:fixed;top:0;left:0;width:100%;z-index:150;
display:flex;justify-content:space-between;align-items:center;
padding:20px 6vw;transition:background .4s ease,padding .4s ease,box-shadow .4s ease;
}
nav .brand{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:10px;text-decoration:none;
font-family:'Cormorant Garamond',serif;font-size:1.45rem;letter-spacing:.03em;color:#fff5f0;
text-shadow:0 1px 10px rgba(20,8,6,.5)}
nav .brand svg{width:23px;height:23px;color:#f6b3a0}
nav .links{display:flex;gap:32px}
nav .links a{
text-decoration:none;color:rgba(255,245,240,.88);font-size:.76rem;
text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:.18em;transition:color .3s;position:relative;
text-shadow:0 1px 8px rgba(20,8,6,.5)}
nav .links a::after{content:"";position:absolute;left:0;bottom:-6px;width:0;height:1px;
background:var(--coral);transition:width .3s}
nav .links a:hover{color:#fff}
nav .links a:hover::after{width:100%}
nav .nav-cta{display:inline-flex;align-items:center;gap:8px;text-decoration:none;
padding:11px 20px;border:1px solid rgba(255,245,240,.55);border-radius:4px;color:#fff5f0;
font-size:.72rem;letter-spacing:.16em;text-transform:uppercase;transition:all .3s}
nav .nav-cta .arr{transition:transform .3s}
nav .nav-cta:hover{background:#fff;color:var(--coral-deep);border-color:#fff}
nav .nav-cta:hover .arr{transform:translateX(5px)}
/* scrolled state — switches to light glass bar with dark text */
nav.scrolled{background:rgba(255,248,244,.86);backdrop-filter:blur(14px);
-webkit-backdrop-filter:blur(14px);padding:13px 6vw;box-shadow:0 10px 34px -20px rgba(120,40,30,.5)}
nav.scrolled .brand{color:var(--coral-deep);text-shadow:none}
nav.scrolled .links a{color:var(--ink-soft);text-shadow:none}
nav.scrolled .nav-cta{border-color:var(--coral-deep);color:var(--coral-deep)}
nav.scrolled .nav-cta:hover{background:var(--coral-deep);color:#fff;border-color:var(--coral-deep)}
@media(max-width:820px){nav .links{display:none}}
@media(max-width:520px){nav .nav-cta{display:none}}
/* ---------- HERO (scroll-scrubbed video) ---------- */
.hero{
height:100vh;min-height:640px;display:flex;align-items:center;
background:#1a0f0d;overflow:hidden;
}
.hero-media{position:absolute;inset:0;z-index:0}
.hero-media canvas{
position:absolute;inset:0;width:100%;height:100%;object-fit:cover;
will-change:transform;
}
/* scrim: keeps left-side copy legible over the footage */
.hero-scrim{
position:absolute;inset:0;z-index:1;
background:
linear-gradient(90deg, rgba(28,12,9,.92) 0%, rgba(28,12,9,.72) 32%, rgba(28,12,9,.25) 56%, rgba(28,12,9,0) 74%),
linear-gradient(0deg, rgba(28,12,9,.6) 0%, rgba(28,12,9,0) 45%);
}
.hero-inner{position:relative;z-index:5;width:100%;padding:0 6vw;display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;align-items:center;gap:20px}
.hero-copy{position:relative;z-index:5}
/* light theme overrides for copy on dark video */
.hero .eyebrow{color:#ffd4c6;text-shadow:0 1px 10px rgba(20,8,6,.6)}
.hero h1{color:#fffaf7 !important;text-shadow:0 4px 40px rgba(15,6,4,.6),0 1px 6px rgba(15,6,4,.55)}
.hero .rule{background:#f6b3a0;opacity:.95;box-shadow:0 0 12px rgba(0,0,0,.3)}
.hero p.lede{color:#fbeae3;text-shadow:0 1px 14px rgba(20,8,6,.6)}
.hero .btn-fill{background:var(--coral);border-color:var(--coral);color:#fff}
.hero .btn-fill:hover{background:var(--rose);border-color:var(--rose)}
.hero .btn-ghost{color:#fbe5da;border-color:rgba(251,229,218,.6)}
.hero .btn-ghost:hover{background:rgba(255,255,255,.12)}
.hero-badges .badge+.badge{border-left-color:rgba(255,255,255,.28)}
.hero-badges svg{color:#f3a48f}
.hero-badges span{color:#eccfc6}
/* scroll hint */
.scroll-hint{position:absolute;bottom:34px;left:50%;transform:translateX(-50%);
z-index:6;display:flex;flex-direction:column;align-items:center;gap:10px;color:#f4ddd5}
.scroll-hint span{font-size:.7rem;letter-spacing:.26em;text-transform:uppercase;opacity:.85}
.scroll-hint i{display:block;width:1px;height:42px;background:linear-gradient(#f4ddd5,transparent);
transform-origin:top;animation:hintPulse 1.8s ease-in-out infinite}
@keyframes hintPulse{0%,100%{transform:scaleY(.4);opacity:.4}50%{transform:scaleY(1);opacity:1}}
.hero-eyebrow{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:12px;margin-bottom:26px}
.hero-eyebrow svg{width:22px;height:22px;color:var(--coral)}
.hero h1{
font-size:clamp(3.4rem,9vw,7.2rem);line-height:.96;color:var(--ink);
letter-spacing:-.01em;
}
.hero h1 .line{display:block;overflow:hidden}
.hero h1 .line span{display:inline-block;will-change:transform}
.rule{height:1px;width:120px;background:var(--coral-deep);opacity:.6;margin:34px 0 26px}
.hero p.lede{font-size:1.15rem;color:var(--ink-soft);max-width:360px;line-height:1.6;font-weight:300}
.cta-row{display:flex;gap:16px;margin-top:38px;flex-wrap:wrap}
.btn{
font-family:'Jost',sans-serif;font-size:.78rem;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:.18em;
padding:18px 30px;border-radius:4px;cursor:pointer;border:1px solid var(--coral-deep);
display:inline-flex;align-items:center;gap:12px;transition:all .35s ease;text-decoration:none;
}
.btn .arr{transition:transform .35s ease}
.btn:hover .arr{transform:translateX(6px)}
.btn-fill{background:var(--coral-deep);color:#fff}
.btn-fill:hover{background:var(--rose)}
.btn-ghost{background:transparent;color:var(--coral-deep)}
.btn-ghost:hover{background:rgba(177,67,52,.08)}
.hero-badges{display:flex;gap:0;margin-top:54px;max-width:440px}
.hero-badges .badge{flex:1;display:flex;flex-direction:column;align-items:flex-start;gap:10px;padding-right:18px}
.hero-badges .badge+.badge{border-left:1px solid rgba(177,67,52,.25);padding-left:22px}
.hero-badges svg{width:26px;height:26px;color:var(--coral)}
.hero-badges span{font-size:.72rem;letter-spacing:.16em;text-transform:uppercase;color:var(--ink-soft)}
@media(max-width:860px){
.hero-inner{grid-template-columns:1fr}
.hero-scrim{background:
linear-gradient(0deg, rgba(40,20,16,.85) 0%, rgba(40,20,16,.35) 55%, rgba(40,20,16,.15) 100%)}
}
/* floating petals layer (global) */
.float-petal{position:absolute;pointer-events:none;opacity:.0;z-index:2}
/* ---------- MARQUEE ---------- */
.marquee{
background:var(--coral-deep);color:var(--peach-100);
padding:30px 0;overflow:hidden;white-space:nowrap;
}
.marquee .track{display:inline-block;will-change:transform}
.marquee span{
font-family:'Cormorant Garamond',serif;font-style:italic;
font-size:2.2rem;padding:0 30px;opacity:.9;
}
.marquee span::after{content:"✿";font-style:normal;font-size:1.1rem;margin-left:58px;opacity:.6;vertical-align:middle}
/* ---------- INTRO / philosophy ---------- */
.philosophy{padding:18vh 6vw;background:var(--cream);text-align:center;overflow:hidden}
.philosophy .big{
font-size:clamp(2rem,5vw,4rem);line-height:1.25;max-width:1000px;margin:0 auto;color:var(--ink);
}
.philosophy .big .word{display:inline-block;opacity:.12;will-change:opacity,transform}
.philosophy .accent{color:var(--coral);font-style:italic}
/* ---------- HORIZONTAL GALLERY ---------- */
.gallery-pin{height:100vh;overflow:hidden;background:linear-gradient(180deg,var(--peach-100),var(--peach-200))}
.gallery-head{position:absolute;top:8vh;left:6vw;z-index:5}
.gallery-head h2{font-size:clamp(2.4rem,5vw,4rem);color:var(--ink)}
.gallery-cta{margin-top:22px}
.gallery-track{display:flex;height:100vh;align-items:center;gap:4vw;padding:0 6vw;will-change:transform}
.card{
flex:0 0 auto;width:min(34vw,440px);min-width:300px;aspect-ratio:4/5;border-radius:14px;
position:relative;overflow:hidden;box-shadow:0 36px 70px -34px rgba(120,40,30,.6);
background:#2a1815;
}
.card .bloom{position:absolute;inset:0;overflow:hidden}
/* image fills the card exactly (4:5 matches source) → full flower, no harsh crop.
top/left 0 so the GSAP ken-burns transform doesn't fight CSS centering */
.card .bloom img{position:absolute;top:0;left:0;width:100%;height:100%;
object-fit:cover;will-change:transform}
.card .meta{position:absolute;left:0;bottom:0;width:100%;padding:26px 28px;color:#fff;
background:linear-gradient(0deg,rgba(48,28,24,.92),rgba(48,28,24,.55) 55%,transparent);z-index:2}
.card .meta h3{font-size:clamp(1.5rem,2.2vw,1.95rem);line-height:1.08}
.card .meta p{font-size:.74rem;letter-spacing:.16em;text-transform:uppercase;opacity:.9;margin-top:6px}
.card .card-cta{display:inline-flex;align-items:center;gap:8px;margin-top:16px;
font-size:.72rem;letter-spacing:.18em;text-transform:uppercase;color:#fff;text-decoration:none;
padding:10px 18px;border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.55);border-radius:4px;transition:all .3s}
.card .card-cta .arr{transition:transform .3s}
.card .card-cta:hover{background:#fff;color:var(--coral-deep)}
.card .card-cta:hover .arr{transform:translateX(5px)}
@media(max-width:860px){.card{width:74vw}}
/* ---------- PARALLAX STORY ---------- */
.story{height:100vh;min-height:640px;background:var(--ink);color:var(--peach-100);overflow:hidden;
display:flex;align-items:center;padding:0 6vw;position:relative}
.story .layer{position:absolute;pointer-events:none}
.story-copy{position:relative;z-index:6;max-width:560px}
.story-copy .eyebrow{color:var(--coral)}
.story-copy h2{font-size:clamp(2.6rem,6vw,5rem);line-height:1.05;margin:20px 0 26px;color:var(--peach-50)}
.story-copy p{font-size:1.1rem;line-height:1.8;color:#d9c3bb;font-weight:300;max-width:460px}
.glow{position:absolute;right:-10vw;top:50%;transform:translateY(-50%);
width:60vw;height:60vw;border-radius:50%;
background:radial-gradient(circle,rgba(232,106,90,.45),transparent 60%);filter:blur(20px);z-index:1}
.craft-video{position:absolute;right:2.5vw;top:50%;transform:translateY(-50%);
width:min(54vw,720px);aspect-ratio:16/9;z-index:4;border-radius:16px;overflow:hidden;
box-shadow:0 44px 80px -32px rgba(0,0,0,.65)}
.craft-video video{width:100%;height:100%;object-fit:cover;display:block}
@media(max-width:860px){
.story{padding:14vh 6vw}
.craft-video{position:absolute;right:-8vw;width:92vw;opacity:.5;z-index:1}
}
/* ---------- STATS ---------- */
.stats{padding:16vh 6vw;background:var(--peach-50);display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(4,1fr);gap:30px;text-align:center}
.stat .num{font-family:'Cormorant Garamond',serif;font-size:clamp(3rem,7vw,5.5rem);color:var(--coral-deep);line-height:1}
.stat .lbl{font-size:.76rem;letter-spacing:.2em;text-transform:uppercase;color:var(--ink-soft);margin-top:14px}
@media(max-width:760px){.stats{grid-template-columns:repeat(2,1fr);gap:50px 20px}}
/* ---------- QUOTE reveal ---------- */
.quote{padding:20vh 6vw;background:var(--cream);text-align:center}
.quote blockquote{font-family:'Cormorant Garamond',serif;font-style:italic;
font-size:clamp(1.8rem,4.5vw,3.4rem);line-height:1.35;max-width:900px;margin:0 auto;color:var(--ink)}
.quote .word{display:inline-block;will-change:opacity,filter}
.quote cite{display:block;margin-top:40px;font-style:normal;font-size:.8rem;letter-spacing:.24em;
text-transform:uppercase;color:var(--coral-deep)}
/* ---------- CTA / FOOTER ---------- */
.cta{
min-height:96vh;display:flex;flex-direction:column;align-items:center;justify-content:center;
text-align:center;padding:0 6vw;position:relative;overflow:hidden;
background:radial-gradient(120% 100% at 50% 120%,var(--coral),var(--peach-200) 60%,var(--peach-50));
}
.cta h2{font-size:clamp(3rem,9vw,7rem);color:var(--cream);line-height:.98;letter-spacing:-.01em}
.cta p{color:var(--cream);opacity:.9;margin:24px 0 40px;font-size:1.15rem;font-weight:300}
.cta .btn-fill{background:var(--ink);border-color:var(--ink)}
.cta .btn-fill:hover{background:#2a1815}
.cta-petal{position:absolute;pointer-events:none;opacity:.85}
.cta-inner{position:relative;z-index:3;display:flex;flex-direction:column;align-items:center;will-change:transform}
.petal-canvas{position:absolute;inset:0;width:100%;height:100%;z-index:2;pointer-events:none}
footer{background:var(--ink);color:var(--peach-200);padding:90px 6vw 36px}
.foot-top{display:grid;grid-template-columns:1.4fr 2fr;gap:60px;
padding-bottom:54px;border-bottom:1px solid rgba(247,210,194,.14)}
.foot-logo{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:10px;margin-bottom:20px}
.foot-logo svg{width:24px;height:24px;color:var(--coral)}
footer .brand{font-family:'Cormorant Garamond',serif;font-size:1.7rem;color:var(--peach-100)}
.foot-brand p{color:#c9aaa1;font-weight:300;line-height:1.7;max-width:330px;font-size:.95rem}
.socials{display:flex;gap:12px;margin-top:24px}
.socials a{width:40px;height:40px;border-radius:50%;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;
border:1px solid rgba(247,210,194,.25);color:var(--peach-200);transition:all .3s}
.socials svg{width:18px;height:18px}
.socials a:hover{background:var(--coral);border-color:var(--coral);color:#fff;transform:translateY(-3px)}
.foot-cols{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(3,1fr);gap:30px}
.foot-col h4{font-family:'Jost',sans-serif;font-size:.74rem;letter-spacing:.2em;text-transform:uppercase;
color:var(--coral);margin-bottom:18px;font-weight:500}
.foot-col a{display:block;color:#cbb0a8;text-decoration:none;font-size:.92rem;font-weight:300;
margin-bottom:12px;transition:color .25s,transform .25s}
.foot-col a:hover{color:var(--peach-100);transform:translateX(4px)}
.foot-bottom{display:flex;justify-content:space-between;align-items:center;flex-wrap:wrap;gap:16px;padding-top:28px}
footer .small{font-size:.78rem;letter-spacing:.08em;opacity:.55}
.foot-legal{display:flex;gap:26px}
.foot-legal a{color:#cbb0a8;text-decoration:none;font-size:.78rem;letter-spacing:.06em;transition:color .25s}
.foot-legal a:hover{color:var(--coral)}
@media(max-width:760px){
.foot-top{grid-template-columns:1fr;gap:40px}
.foot-cols{grid-template-columns:repeat(2,1fr)}
.foot-bottom{flex-direction:column;align-items:flex-start}
}
/* ---------- EDITORIAL SPLIT ---------- */
.editorial{padding:16vh 6vw;background:var(--peach-50);overflow:hidden}
.ed-row{display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;align-items:center;gap:6vw;max-width:1180px;margin:0 auto}
.ed-row+.ed-row{margin-top:14vh}
.ed-row.reverse .ed-img{order:2}
.ed-img{position:relative;border-radius:16px;overflow:hidden;aspect-ratio:4/3;
clip-path:inset(0 100% 0 0);box-shadow:0 34px 64px -34px rgba(120,40,30,.55)}
.ed-img img{width:100%;height:100%;object-fit:cover;transform:scale(1.12);will-change:transform}
.ed-text .eyebrow{display:block;margin-bottom:6px}
.ed-text h2{font-family:'Cormorant Garamond',serif;font-size:clamp(2.4rem,6vw,4.6rem);
line-height:1.02;color:var(--ink);margin:12px 0 22px}
.ed-text em{font-style:italic;color:var(--coral)}
.ed-text p{color:var(--ink-soft);font-size:1.15rem;line-height:1.8;font-weight:300;max-width:430px}
@media(max-width:760px){.ed-row,.ed-row.reverse{grid-template-columns:1fr;gap:34px}.ed-row.reverse .ed-img{order:0}}
/* ---------- SEASONS (pinned crossfade) ---------- */
.seasons{height:100vh;position:relative;overflow:hidden;background:#1a0f0d}
.seasons-stage{position:absolute;inset:0}
.season-layer{position:absolute;inset:0;background-size:cover;background-position:center;opacity:0;will-change:opacity,transform}
.seasons-overlay{position:absolute;inset:0;
background:linear-gradient(0deg,rgba(20,10,8,.7),rgba(20,10,8,.15) 60%,rgba(20,10,8,.35))}
.seasons-labels{position:absolute;inset:0;display:flex;flex-direction:column;align-items:center;justify-content:center;text-align:center;z-index:3}
.seasons-labels .eyebrow{color:#f7c9bb;margin-bottom:24px;z-index:4}
.season-word{position:absolute;top:54%;left:50%;transform:translate(-50%,-50%);
font-family:'Cormorant Garamond',serif;font-weight:500;
font-size:clamp(3rem,13vw,10rem);color:#fff5f0;letter-spacing:.01em;opacity:0;
text-shadow:0 6px 50px rgba(0,0,0,.4)}
.seasons-progress{position:absolute;left:50%;bottom:8%;transform:translateX(-50%);
width:210px;height:2px;background:rgba(255,255,255,.25);z-index:4}
.seasons-progress span{display:block;height:100%;width:0;background:#f6b3a0}
/* ---------- PROCESS timeline ---------- */
.process{padding:18vh 6vw;background:var(--cream)}
.proc-head{text-align:center;margin-bottom:10vh}
.proc-head h2{font-family:'Cormorant Garamond',serif;font-size:clamp(2.2rem,5vw,4rem);color:var(--ink);margin-top:8px}
.proc-wrap{position:relative;max-width:920px;margin:0 auto}

<script>
/* =========================================================
   ASSET BUILDERS
   ========================================================= */
const NS = "http://www.w3.org/2000/svg";

// Build a layered dahlia. Returns an <svg> string.
function buildDahlia(palette){
  const cx=400, cy=400;
  const rings=[
    {count:16, rOut:360, rIn:150, w:78, opacity:1},
    {count:14, rOut:280, rIn:110, w:70, opacity:1},
    {count:12, rOut:210, rIn:80,  w:60, opacity:1},
    {count:10, rOut:150, rIn:55,  w:50, opacity:1},
    {count:8,  rOut:95,  rIn:30,  w:40, opacity:1},
  ];
  let petals="";
  let idx=0;
  rings.forEach((ring,ri)=>{
    const col=palette[ri % palette.length];
    for(let i=0;i<ring.count;i++){
      const ang=(360/ring.count)*i + (ri%2?180/ring.count:0);
      const half=ring.w/2;
      // petal as a rounded teardrop path pointing up from center
      const path=`M0,0 C ${half},-${ring.rOut*0.35} ${half},-${ring.rOut*0.8} 0,-${ring.rOut}
                  C -${half},-${ring.rOut*0.8} -${half},-${ring.rOut*0.35} 0,0 Z`;
      petals+=`<path class="petal" data-ring="${ri}" data-i="${idx}"
                 d="${path}" fill="${col}"
                 transform="translate(${cx},${cy}) rotate(${ang})" />`;
      idx++;
    }
  });
  // center
  petals+=`<circle cx="${cx}" cy="${cy}" r="34" fill="${palette[5]}" class="flower-core"/>`;
  for(let i=0;i<10;i++){
    const a=(36*i)*Math.PI/180;
    petals+=`<circle cx="${cx+Math.cos(a)*18}" cy="${cy+Math.sin(a)*18}" r="6" fill="${palette[4]}" class="flower-core"/>`;
  }
  return `<svg viewBox="0 0 800 800" id="dahliaSvg">${petals}</svg>`;
}

// Small bloom for gallery cards / floating petals
function buildSmallBloom(palette){
  const cx=200,cy=200;let p="";
  const rings=[{c:12,r:180,w:60},{c:10,r:130,w:52},{c:8,r:88,w:44}];
  rings.forEach((ring,ri)=>{
    const col=palette[ri%palette.length];
    for(let i=0;i<ring.c;i++){
      const ang=(360/ring.c)*i+(ri%2?180/ring.c:0);
      const h=ring.w/2;
      const path=`M0,0 C ${h},-${ring.r*0.4} ${h},-${ring.r*0.85} 0,-${ring.r} C -${h},-${ring.r*0.85} -${h},-${ring.r*0.4} 0,0 Z`;
      p+=`<path d="${path}" fill="${col}" transform="translate(${cx},${cy}) rotate(${ang})"/>`;
    }
  });
  p+=`<circle cx="${cx}" cy="${cy}" r="26" fill="${palette[4]}"/>`;
  return `<svg viewBox="0 0 400 400">${p}</svg>`;
}

const heroPalette=["#f6b3a0","#f29982","#ef7e68","#ea5f50","#d8324a","#b3243f"];
const palettes=[
  ["#f7c1b2","#f2a08e","#ed7d6b","#e55c52","#cf2f47","#a82240"],
  ["#f3b8c6","#ec90a6","#e26a87","#d44a6e","#b53259","#8f2148"],
  ["#f6c9a8","#efa97f","#e6895d","#d96b45","#bd4f33","#963c28"],
  ["#e9b6c9","#d98fb0","#c66a96","#b14a7e","#933767","#722851"],
  ["#f5b9a6","#ee9682","#e6745f","#d65749","#b53b35","#902f2c"],
];

// inject gallery cards
const galleryData=[
  {name:"Peach Dahlia",     tag:"Soft · Coral",       img:"https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/gh/souranyp-stack/ura-scroll-sequence@b09a3f691041d7cee83884f2e9c894d56f406285/assets/card-1.jpg"},
  {name:"Magenta Dahlia",   tag:"Bold · Vivid",       img:"https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/gh/souranyp-stack/ura-scroll-sequence@b09a3f691041d7cee83884f2e9c894d56f406285/assets/card-2.jpg"},
  {name:"White Anemone",    tag:"Pure · Delicate",    img:"https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/gh/souranyp-stack/ura-scroll-sequence@b09a3f691041d7cee83884f2e9c894d56f406285/assets/card-3.jpg"},
  {name:"Golden Lily",      tag:"Warm · Radiant",     img:"https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/gh/souranyp-stack/ura-scroll-sequence@b09a3f691041d7cee83884f2e9c894d56f406285/assets/card-4.jpg"},
  {name:"Lavender Anemone", tag:"Cool · Dreamy",      img:"https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/gh/souranyp-stack/ura-scroll-sequence@b09a3f691041d7cee83884f2e9c894d56f406285/assets/card-5.jpg"},
];
const track=document.getElementById('galleryTrack');
galleryData.forEach((d,i)=>{
  const card=document.createElement('div');
  card.className='card';
  card.innerHTML=`
    <div class="bloom"><img src="${d.img}" alt="${d.name}" loading="lazy" /></div>
    <div class="meta">
      <h3>${d.name}</h3>
      <p>${d.tag}</p>
      <a class="card-cta" href="#cta">Shop now <span class="arr">→</span></a>
    </div>`;
  track.appendChild(card);
});

// floating petals in hero + story
function spawnPetals(host, count, palette, opts={}){
  for(let i=0;i<count;i++){
    const el=document.createElement('div');
    el.className=(opts.cls||'float-petal');
    const size=opts.size||(18+Math.random()*40);
    el.style.width=size+'px';el.style.height=size*1.4+'px';
    el.style.left=(Math.random()*100)+'%';
    el.style.top=(Math.random()*100)+'%';
    const col=palette[Math.floor(Math.random()*palette.length)];
    el.innerHTML=`<svg viewBox="0 0 40 56" style="width:100%;height:100%"><path d="M20 0 C34 14 34 38 20 56 C6 38 6 14 20 0 Z" fill="${col}"/></svg>`;
    host.appendChild(el);
  }
}

/* =========================================================
   GSAP ANIMATIONS
   ========================================================= */
gsap.registerPlugin(ScrollTrigger);

/* progress bar */
gsap.to("#progress",{scaleX:1,ease:"none",
  scrollTrigger:{trigger:document.body,start:"top top",end:"bottom bottom",scrub:.3}});

/* ---- HERO intro: text reveal on load ---- */
const introTl=gsap.timeline({defaults:{ease:"power3.out"},delay:.2});
introTl
  .from(".hero h1 .line span",{yPercent:120,duration:1,stagger:.12,ease:"power4.out"},0)
  .from(".hero-eyebrow",{opacity:0,x:-20,duration:.8},0.1)
  .from(".rule",{scaleX:0,transformOrigin:"left",duration:.8},0.5)
  .from(".hero p.lede",{opacity:0,y:20,duration:.8},0.6)
  .from(".cta-row .btn",{opacity:0,y:24,duration:.7,stagger:.12},0.7)
  .from(".hero-badges .badge",{opacity:0,y:20,duration:.6,stagger:.1},0.9)
  .from(".scroll-hint",{opacity:0,y:20,duration:.8},1.0);

/* =========================================================
   SCROLL-SCRUBBED HERO VIDEO
   The page scroll drives video.currentTime while the hero is
   pinned, so footage plays forward/backward with the wheel.
   ========================================================= */
const heroCanvas=document.getElementById('heroCanvas');
const hctx=heroCanvas.getContext('2d');
const HERO_BASE="https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/gh/souranyp-stack/ura-scroll-sequence@b09a3f691041d7cee83884f2e9c894d56f406285/frames/";
const HERO_COUNT=120;
const heroImgs=[]; let heroCur=-1;
function drawHero(i){
  const img=heroImgs[i]; if(!img||!img.complete||!img.naturalWidth) return;
  const cw=heroCanvas.clientWidth, ch=heroCanvas.clientHeight, ir=img.naturalWidth/img.naturalHeight, cr=cw/ch;
  let w,h2,x,y; if(ir>cr){h2=ch;w=ch*ir;x=(cw-w)/2;y=0;}else{w=cw;h2=cw/ir;x=0;y=(ch-h2)/2;}
  hctx.clearRect(0,0,cw,ch); hctx.drawImage(img,x,y,w,h2); heroCur=i;
}
function heroResize(){
  const dpr=Math.min(window.devicePixelRatio||1,2);
  heroCanvas.width=heroCanvas.clientWidth*dpr; heroCanvas.height=heroCanvas.clientHeight*dpr;
  hctx.setTransform(dpr,0,0,dpr,0,0);
  drawHero(heroCur<0?0:heroCur);
}
for(let i=1;i<=HERO_COUNT;i++){ const im=new Image(); im.onload=()=>{ if(heroCur<0){drawHero(0);} }; im.src=HERO_BASE+String(i).padStart(4,'0')+'.webp'; heroImgs[i-1]=im; }
window.addEventListener('resize',heroResize,{passive:true});
heroResize();

// scroll drives which frame is drawn while the hero is pinned
const scrubber={p:0};
gsap.to(scrubber,{p:1,ease:"none",
  scrollTrigger:{
    trigger:".hero", start:"top top", end:"+=220%", scrub:0.6,
    pin:true, anticipatePin:1, refreshPriority:40, invalidateOnRefresh:true
  },
  onUpdate(){ const f=Math.min(HERO_COUNT-1, Math.round(scrubber.p*(HERO_COUNT-1))); if(f!==heroCur) drawHero(f); }
});

/* ---- PHILOSOPHY word-by-word reveal ---- */
(function(){
  const el=document.getElementById('philText');
  // wrap non-accent text nodes into words while preserving the accent span
  const accent=el.querySelector('.accent');
  const nodes=[...el.childNodes];
  el.innerHTML='';
  nodes.forEach(node=>{
    if(node.nodeType===3){
      node.textContent.split(/(\s+)/).forEach(w=>{
        if(w.trim()===''){el.appendChild(document.createTextNode(w));}
        else{const s=document.createElement('span');s.className='word';s.textContent=w;el.appendChild(s);}
      });
    } else { node.classList.add('word'); el.appendChild(node); }
  });
  gsap.to("#philText .word",{opacity:1,y:0,duration:.6,stagger:.06,ease:"power2.out",
    scrollTrigger:{trigger:"#philText",start:"top 75%",end:"bottom 55%",scrub:1}});
  gsap.set("#philText .word",{y:14});
})();

/* ---- STORY: scroll-scrubbed puzzle-assembly video ---- *
 * Section pins; page scroll drives the video's currentTime so the pieces
 * assemble into the flower as you scroll (and come apart scrolling back). */
(function(){
  const v=document.getElementById('craftVideo');
  const FALLBACK=8;
  const dur=()=>{const d=v.duration;return (d&&isFinite(d)&&d>0)?d:FALLBACK;};
  v.pause();
  v.addEventListener('loadedmetadata',()=>{try{v.currentTime=0.001;}catch(e){}ScrollTrigger.refresh();});
  const prog={p:0};
  gsap.to(prog,{p:1,ease:"none",
    scrollTrigger:{trigger:".story",start:"top top",end:"+=200%",scrub:0.6,
      pin:true,anticipatePin:1,refreshPriority:10,invalidateOnRefresh:true},
    onUpdate(){ if(v.readyState<1) return; const d=dur(); const t=Math.min(prog.p*d, d-0.05); if(isFinite(t)) v.currentTime=t; }
  });
  // subtle zoom on the footage as it assembles
  gsap.fromTo(".craft-video video",{scale:1.08},{scale:1,ease:"none",
    scrollTrigger:{trigger:".story",start:"top top",end:"+=200%",scrub:0.6}});
})();

gsap.fromTo(".cta-inner",{scale:0.72,opacity:0},{scale:1,opacity:1,ease:"power2.out",

/* ---- CTA: interactive falling petals that pile into the footer ---- */
(function(){
  const canvas=document.getElementById('petalCanvas');
  const host=document.querySelector('.cta');
  if(!canvas||!host) return;
  const ctx=canvas.getContext('2d');
  const colors=["#f6b3a0","#f29982","#ef7e68","#ea5f50","#f3a48f","#e86a5a","#d8324a","#f7c1b2"];
  let W=0,H=0,DPR=Math.min(window.devicePixelRatio||1,2);
  let falling=[], settled=[], cols=0, pileH=[], running=false, raf=0;
  const MAX_FALLING=120, MAX_SETTLED=240;
  const mouse={x:-9999,y:-9999};

  function resize(){
    const r=host.getBoundingClientRect();
    W=r.width; H=r.height;
    canvas.width=Math.max(1,W*DPR); canvas.height=Math.max(1,H*DPR);
    canvas.style.width=W+'px'; canvas.style.height=H+'px';
    ctx.setTransform(DPR,0,0,DPR,0,0);
    cols=Math.max(16,Math.round(W/26));
    pileH=new Array(cols).fill(0);
    settled=[];
  }
  const colAt=x=>Math.max(0,Math.min(cols-1,Math.floor(x/W*cols)));
  const groundY=x=>H-pileH[colAt(x)];
  const PILE_CAP=()=>H*0.16;

  function makePetal(top){
    const s=7+Math.random()*9;
    return {x:Math.random()*W, y:top?(-20-Math.random()*40):(-20-Math.random()*H*0.6),
      vx:(Math.random()-.5)*0.4, vy:0.5+Math.random()*0.8,
      rot:Math.random()*Math.PI*2, vr:(Math.random()-.5)*0.05,
      size:s, sway:Math.random()*Math.PI*2, swaySpd:0.01+Math.random()*0.02,
      color:colors[(Math.random()*colors.length)|0], settled:false};
  }
  function drawPetal(p){
    ctx.save(); ctx.translate(p.x,p.y); ctx.rotate(p.rot);
    ctx.globalAlpha=p.settled?0.96:0.92; ctx.fillStyle=p.color;
    ctx.beginPath(); ctx.ellipse(0,0,p.size*0.6,p.size,0,0,Math.PI*2); ctx.fill();
    ctx.globalAlpha*=0.35; ctx.strokeStyle="rgba(255,255,255,.4)"; ctx.lineWidth=0.6;
    ctx.beginPath(); ctx.moveTo(0,-p.size*0.8); ctx.lineTo(0,p.size*0.8); ctx.stroke();
    ctx.restore();
  }
  function settle(p){
    const c=colAt(p.x);
    p.y=groundY(p.x)-p.size*0.3; p.settled=true; p.vr=0;
    pileH[c]+=p.size*0.55;
    if(c>0)pileH[c-1]+=p.size*0.18; if(c<cols-1)pileH[c+1]+=p.size*0.18;
    settled.push(p);
  }
  function tick(){
    ctx.clearRect(0,0,W,H);
    if(falling.length<MAX_FALLING && Math.random()<0.7) falling.push(makePetal(true));
    for(let i=falling.length-1;i>=0;i--){
      const p=falling[i];
      p.sway+=p.swaySpd;
      p.x+=p.vx+Math.sin(p.sway)*0.7;
      p.vy+=0.012; p.y+=p.vy; p.rot+=p.vr;
      // interactive: cursor pushes petals away
      const dx=p.x-mouse.x, dy=p.y-mouse.y, d=Math.hypot(dx,dy);
      if(d<100 && d>0.1){ const f=(100-d)/100*2.6; p.x+=dx/d*f; p.y+=dy/d*f*0.5; }
      if(p.x<-20)p.x=W+20; else if(p.x>W+20)p.x=-20;
      if(p.y>=groundY(p.x)-p.size*0.5){
        if(pileH[colAt(p.x)]<PILE_CAP() && settled.length<MAX_SETTLED){ settle(p); falling.splice(i,1); }
        else { Object.assign(p,makePetal(true)); }        // pile full -> recycle to top
      }
    }
    // cursor can disturb the settled carpet a little
    for(const p of settled){
      const dx=p.x-mouse.x, dy=p.y-mouse.y, d=Math.hypot(dx,dy);
      if(d<70 && d>0.1){ p.x+=dx/d*0.8; p.rot+=0.03; }
      drawPetal(p);
    }
    for(const p of falling) drawPetal(p);
    raf=requestAnimationFrame(tick);
  }
  function start(){ if(running)return; running=true; raf=requestAnimationFrame(tick); }
  function stop(){ running=false; cancelAnimationFrame(raf); }

  resize();
  window.addEventListener('resize',resize);
  document.addEventListener('mousemove',e=>{
    const r=canvas.getBoundingClientRect();
    mouse.x=e.clientX-r.left; mouse.y=e.clientY-r.top;
  },{passive:true});
  document.addEventListener('mouseleave',()=>{mouse.x=mouse.y=-9999;});
  // only animate while the CTA is on screen
  ScrollTrigger.create({trigger:".cta",start:"top bottom",end:"bottom top",
    onToggle:self=>self.isActive?start():stop()});
})();

/* ---- SEASONS: pinned crossfade of layers + words ---- */
(function(){
  const layers=gsap.utils.toArray('.season-layer');
  const words=gsap.utils.toArray('.season-word');
  const END="+=420%";
  gsap.set(layers,{opacity:0});
  gsap.set(layers[0],{opacity:1,scale:1.05});
  gsap.set(words,{opacity:0,y:34});
  gsap.set(words[0],{opacity:1,y:0});

  // scrub:1.4 adds momentum-style smoothing; holds let each season breathe
  const tl=gsap.timeline({defaults:{ease:"power2.inOut"},
    scrollTrigger:{trigger:".seasons",start:"top top",end:END,scrub:1.4,pin:true,anticipatePin:1,refreshPriority:20}});

  const FADE=0.9, HOLD=1.3;
  let t=0;
  // slow ken-burns while the first season holds
  tl.to(layers[0],{scale:1.13,duration:FADE+HOLD,ease:"none"},t);
  t+=HOLD;
  for(let i=1;i<layers.length;i++){
    tl.to(layers[i-1],{opacity:0,duration:FADE},t)
      .fromTo(layers[i],{opacity:0,scale:1.14},{opacity:1,scale:1.05,duration:FADE},t)
      .to(words[i-1],{opacity:0,y:-34,duration:FADE*0.7},t)
      .fromTo(words[i],{opacity:0,y:34},{opacity:1,y:0,duration:FADE*0.7},t+FADE*0.3)
      // continue a gentle zoom through the hold so it never feels frozen
      .to(layers[i],{scale:1.13,duration:HOLD,ease:"none"},t+FADE);
    t+=FADE+HOLD;
  }
  gsap.to("#seasonsBar",{width:"100%",ease:"none",
    scrollTrigger:{trigger:".seasons",start:"top top",end:END,scrub:1.4}});
})();

});
